title: ProcessOwnershipLedger integration for model-process spawn
goal: Every ModelRuntime adapter that spawns a child process (llama.cpp server, candle worker thread pool, abliteration tool) MUST register with ProcessOwnershipLedger (spec §5.7.2; cluster A HBR-QUIET-003) before the spawn returns. This MT lands the integration shim so MT-072 (LlamaCppRuntime spawn) and MT-082 (CandleRuntime), MT-106 (abliteration tool) can call a single helper.
expected_diff_shape: New src/backend/handshake_core/src/model_runtime/process_ledger_integration.rs with register_model_process helper; updates to process_ledger module exposing `record_spawn(meta: SpawnMeta) -> Result<ProcessOwnershipRecordId, ...>`; integration test.
unblock_conditions: MT-062 trait + MT-067 registry merged. Note: ProcessOwnershipLedger module itself is owned by cluster A.4 (HBR-QUIET-003); this MT consumes its API. If the cluster A ledger MT is not yet merged at coder-execution time, this MT may stub the integration with a feature flag and surface a depends_on_mts edge at sequencing.
implementation_notes: Per spec §5.7.2 (kernel_process_lifecycle Postgres table): every Handshake-spawned process registers a row in kernel_process_lifecycle within N ms of spawn (operator-set; default 100ms). For ModelRuntime spawns the SpawnMeta carries: `{ pid: u32, engine_kind: EngineKind (enum LlamaCppServer|CandleWorker|AbliterationTool|DistillationJob|CloudByokTransport|OfficialCliBridge), model_id: ModelId, runtime_binding: RuntimeBinding, parent_session_id: SessionId, started_at_utc: DateTime<Utc>, sandbox_adapter: SandboxAdapterKind, metadata_blob: serde_json::Value (capped per Q-PROCESS-LEDGER-SCOPE perf_mitigation per_process_metadata_cap) }`. register_model_process(spec: &LoadSpec, pid: u32, engine_kind: EngineKind) -> Result<ProcessOwnershipRecordId, ModelRuntimeError> calls process_ledger::record_spawn with a constructed SpawnMeta. On spawn failure: a NOT_REGISTERED state is unacceptable; helper must roll back the child process (kill) if the ledger write fails. Per Q-PROCESS-LEDGER-SCOPE perf_mitigation: write is batched (channel-fed background writer with N=100 or 50ms flush window) and async (does not block the spawn-return path); per-process metadata blob capped at 4 KiB (truncate + log warn). FR-EVT-LEDGER-OVERFLOW degraded mode (per spec §5.7.3): if the writer channel backlog exceeds threshold, switch to drop-with-counter mode and emit a structured warn event. ExternalEngineImport endpoints (MT-066) are NOT registered as Handshake-owned (helper short-circuits when provider=ExternalCompat). UUID v7 per HBR-INT-008 for ProcessOwnershipRecordId. Tests: register_model_process from a fake spawn returns a non-null id; double-register same pid returns Err; ExternalCompat short-circuit returns None gracefully; oversized metadata blob is truncated with warn.
risk_if_missed: Model processes spawn outside ledger authority; violates spec §5.7.2 and HBR-QUIET-003; feedback_terminal_hygiene 'no blank/stale terminal windows' intent breaks.
validator_focus: Spawn-then-fail-to-register kills the child; ExternalCompat short-circuit; metadata cap; batched async writer does not block spawn; ProcessOwnershipRecordId uses now_v7().

minimum_controls: Spawn-then-fail-to-register must kill the child process (no orphan).
Metadata blob cap enforced (oversized truncated + warn emitted).
Batched writer cannot deadlock the spawn-return path under backpressure (test under FR-EVT-LEDGER-OVERFLOW degraded mode).

integration_validator_review.verdict_reason: ModelProcessLedgerRegistrar correctly enforces (a) ExternalCompat short-circuits without registry pollution, (b) ProcessEngineKind cross-check against RuntimeBinding (LlamaCpp engine must match LlamaCpp binding, etc.), (c) AbliterationTool explicitly rejected as a ModelRuntime process (offline-only invariant), (d) duplicate-pid registration rejected with rollback, (e) ledger write failure triggers pid-deregister + rollback kill_spawned_process. Metadata blob is capped at 4KiB with overflow event signaling. SandboxRoutedModelAdapter routes through SandboxAdapterRegistry::select with DenyAll net policy and read-only binds for GGUF/tokenizer cache.

Metadata blob is capped at 4KiB with overflow event signaling. SandboxRoutedModelAdapter routes through SandboxAdapterRegistry::select with DenyAll net policy and read-only binds for GGUF/tokenizer cache.
